title: NGX Suspends Trading in Zichis Agro-Allied Industries Shares Amid Investigation - FinancialEDGE
description: The Nigerian Exchange Limited (NGX) has suspended trading in the shares of Zichis Agro-Allied Industries Plc, effective Monday, February 23, 2026. The suspension follows an investigation into the company's trading activities.
html:
The Nigerian Exchange Limited (NGX) has suspended trading in the shares of Zichis Agro-Allied Industries Plc, effective Monday, February 23, 2026.

The suspension follows an investigation into the company's trading activities, with the NGX citing the need to protect the interests of the investing public.

Details of the investigation have not been disclosed, and trading will resume once the probe is concluded.
